TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi beforefieldinit SKGLLayer extends CoreAnimation.CAOpenGLLayer

Docs.summary: A CoreAnimation OpenGL layer that can be drawn on using SkiaSharp drawing commands.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor() cil managed

Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

Docs.value: The current size of the canvas.
Docs.remarks: The canvas size may be different to the view size as a result of the current device's pixel density.

MemberSignature.Value: public override void DrawInCGLContext (OpenGL.CGLContext glContext, OpenGL.CGLPixelFormat pixelFormat, double timeInterval, ref CoreVideo.CVTimeStamp timeStamp);

.method public hidebysig virtual instance void DrawInCGLContext(class OpenGL.CGLContext glContext, class OpenGL.CGLPixelFormat pixelFormat, float64 timeInterval, valuetype CoreVideo.CVTimeStamp& timeStamp) cil managed

Docs.param: The rendering context in to which the OpenGL content should be rendered.
The pixel format used when the context was created.
The display timestamp associated with the time interval. Can be .
Docs.summary: Draws the OpenGL content for the specified time.

MemberSignature.Value: .method familyhidebysig newslot virtual instance void OnPaintSurface(class SkiaSharp.Views.Mac.SKPaintGLSurfaceEventArgs e) cil managed

Docs.param: The event arguments that contain the drawing surface and information.
Docs.summary: Implement this to draw on the canvas.
Occurs when the canvas needs to be redrawn.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig virtual instance void Release(class OpenGL.CGLContext glContext) cil managed
